examples.title: Center basic
examples.description: Block centered horizontally with the default content-width cap.
examples.code: This block is horizontally centered and capped at a configurable max-inline-size. Resize the viewport to see the cap stay in effect.

examples.title: Center intrinsic
examples.description: Intrinsic mode centers based on the natural width of the content rather than filling the container.
examples.code:
A heading

Centered to content width, not container width.
